creator: fukui.FreeBSD@fanet.net
text:
In the GNOME 2.22.0 environment, clock-applet (included in x11/gnome-panel) always crashes.

Fix: 

Apply following patch to x11/gnome-panel, and it works fine.

http://svn.gnome.org/viewvc/gnome-panel/trunk/applets/clock/set-timezone.c?r1=10908&r2=10972&view=patch
How-To-Repeat: Add clock-applet to the panel
